claim_allowed: bounded field-scale experimental test-bed comparison, Lee A/B laboratory-state validation, Ke and Takahashi second-family residual endpoint check, and rights-safe acquisition routes for Sterpi/Chang/Zhu
claim_forbidden: unbounded operational safety forecast, complete erosion trajectory validation without observed continuous trajectories, or Sterpi/Chang/Zhu residual closure without legal full-text digitization
review_benchmark_effect: strengthens validation evidence beyond Lee plus Ke by adding a reproducible field-scale test-bed comparison; does not by itself justify unbounded final-readiness claims
